title: Mon nom est clitoris
overview: This documentary film is a dialogue between young women about female sexuality. Addressing the subject with freedom, courage and humor, they share their stories and experiences with the desire to change the world around them and to assert their right as women to an informed sexual education, free of constraints and taboos.

trailers.title: MON NOM EST CLITORIS de Daphné Leblond et Lisa Billuart Monet - Bande annonce
